The classification of Asplundianthus scabrifolius is further divided into its genus Asplundianthus and its species scabrifolius. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in the treatment of various ailments, such as wounds, skin infections, and gastrointestinal issues.
